name: Moda
description: Moda — AI project management and development planning tool for organizing and prioritizing engineering work.

seo.title: Moda — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Moda: Moda — AI project management and development planning tool for organizing and prioritizing engineering work.

when_to_use: Building AI-powered fashion recommendation and styling features
Generating outfit suggestions from item catalog with AI matching
Running visual similarity search over fashion product images
Building personalized shopping features with AI style intelligence

pros: Lighter weight than Jira or Linear for planning
Focuses on dev planning rather than ticket bureaucracy
cons: Miscategorized as code assistant, it is really a PM tool
Linear and Height are hard incumbents to displace
AI prioritization outputs still need human judgment
review.verdict: A nice planning aid, but not a coding tool and unlikely to dethrone Linear for most teams.
review.best_for: Small engineering teams wanting a lightweight AI-assisted planning tool
review.not_for: Teams committed to Linear, Jira, or needing deep ticket tracking
